name: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc.
one_liner: A global publicly owned investment management firm offering mutual funds, subadvisory services, separate account management, and retirement plans for individuals, institutions, and financial intermediaries.

ambiguities: business_model set to 'enterprise software' as closest schema match, but T. Rowe Price is primarily a B2C/B2B investment management firm; 'other' could also apply.
total_raised_usd is null because T. Rowe Price has been publicly listed since 1986 and no private funding round data is applicable.
AUM of $1,606.6 billion as of December 31, 2024 per 2024 Annual Report; revenue of $7.09 billion in 2024 per AppsRunTheWorld.
headcount growth_12mo_pct of 3% reflects the 3.2% increase from end-2023 to end-2024 per annual report.
